/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shell.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/shell.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/builtins/builtins.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/features/alias/alias.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/features/completion/completion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/features/completion/path_completion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/features/env/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/features/history/history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/exec/exec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/input/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/prompt/prompt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/signals/signals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/shell.dir/shell/terminal/terminal.cpp.o -o shell
